hooks.command: mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records" 2>/dev/null; echo '[yt-os] Session started' >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records/session.log" 2>/dev/null; date >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records/session.log" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records" 2>/dev/null; if ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "[write] jq-missing $(date -Iseconds)" >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records/writes.log" 2>/dev/null; exit 0; fi; FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null); echo "[write] $(date -Iseconds) $FILE" >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records/writes.log" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records" 2>/dev/null; echo '[yt-os] Turn complete at' >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records/session.log" 2>/dev/null; date >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records/session.log" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records" 2>/dev/null; echo '[yt-os] Session ended at' >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records/session.log" 2>/dev/null; date >> "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/state/records/session.log" 2>/dev/null; exit 0
